questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a box-and-whisker plot?

options.A: To display the mean of a dataset
options.B: To show the median and interquartile range
options.C: To compare the range of multiple datasets
options.D: To identify the mode of a dataset

questions.question: A student scored $85, 90, 78, 92, 88$ on their quizzes. What is the interquartile range?
Which of the following is an outlier in the dataset $2, 4, 6, 8, 100$?
A box-and-whisker plot shows a median of $10$ and an interquartile range of $5$. What is the third quartile?
What does the length of the whisker represent in a box-and-whisker plot?
The prices of $5$ video games are $\40, 50, 60, 70, 80$. What is the first quartile?
The times to complete a puzzle are $20, 25, 30, 35, 40$ minutes. What is the interquartile range?
Which of the following datasets has the smallest interquartile range?
Create a box-and-whisker plot for the dataset $12, 15, 18, 20, 22, 25, 30$ and identify the median, first quartile, third quartile, and any outliers.
A company recorded the following daily sales: $200, 220, 250, 280, 300, 320, 350$. Calculate the interquartile range and determine if there are any outliers. Justify your answer.

teacher_rules: Check for any calculations or graphing errors
Ensure all answers are clearly labeled and easy to read
Consider using technology to verify any calculations
